# index-table — Changelog

## 21.0.0

Composant introduit (`IndexTableBodyComponent`, `IndexTableRowCellHeaderComponent`, `IndexTableRowCellComponent`, `IndexTableHeadComponent`, `IndexTableRowComponent`, `IndexTableComponent`).
